instructors.name: Maya Chen
instructors.title: Lead Instructor & Studio Founder
instructors.bio: Maya discovered yoga during a backpacking trip through India in 2008 and never looked back. After completing her 500-hour teacher training in Rishikesh, she spent five years teaching at studios across Southeast Asia before founding 937 Yoga. Her teaching blends traditional Ashtanga with modern movement science, creating sequences that challenge the body while calming the mind. When she's not on the mat, you'll find her foraging for wild herbs or reading philosophy.
instructors.quote: The pose begins when you want to leave it.

instructors.name: James Okafor
instructors.title: Power & Hot Yoga Specialist
instructors.bio: A former collegiate athlete, James found yoga as a way to recover from a career-ending knee injury. What started as physical therapy became a passion. His power yoga classes are legendary — expect to sweat, laugh, and surprise yourself. James holds a degree in exercise science and brings an evidence-based approach to every class, making yoga accessible to athletes and beginners alike.
instructors.quote: Strength isn't about how much you can lift — it's about how gracefully you can hold yourself.

instructors.name: Priya Sharma
instructors.title: Yin & Restorative Specialist
instructors.bio: Priya grew up watching her grandmother practice yoga every morning in their family home in Jaipur. After a decade in corporate consulting left her burned out, she returned to those early morning memories and retrained as a yoga therapist. Her restorative classes feel like a warm blanket for the nervous system. Priya specializes in trauma-informed yoga and works closely with local mental health practitioners.
instructors.quote: Stillness is not the absence of movement — it's the presence of peace.

instructors.name: Alex Rivera
instructors.title: Vinyasa & Prenatal Instructor
instructors.bio: Alex's journey into yoga began through dance. As a former contemporary dancer, they bring a unique sense of rhythm and flow to every class. Their vinyasa sequences feel choreographed — each transition intentional, each breath musical. Alex is also one of our certified prenatal yoga instructors, passionate about supporting parents-to-be through movement and breathwork.
instructors.quote: Flow isn't something you force — it's something you allow.

instructors.name: Sam Tanaka
instructors.title: Meditation & Mindfulness Guide
instructors.bio: Sam spent three years living in a Zen monastery in Kyoto before bringing a contemplative approach to Western yoga studios. His meditation classes are the studio's hidden gem — equal parts profound and surprisingly funny. Sam believes that mindfulness shouldn't feel like homework. He's the author of 'Sit Down, Shut Up, and Breathe' — a no-nonsense guide to starting a meditation practice.
instructors.quote: Your mind will wander. That's not failure — that's the practice.
